list.name: A winner is you!
list.description:
Welcome to the Omega Games. This is your first challenge.
It's quite simple. But the later challenges will not be so easy.
Press the button to get your first 100 points.
list.html: <form method='post'> <input type='hidden' name='challenge_id' value='1'><input type='hidden' name='completed' value='1'><button type='submit'>Complete Challenge</button></form>

list.name: Propaganda
list.description:
Time to prove your loyalty.
Follow the instagram account, put the newest post on your story, tag the account, and include your username.
The account must be able to see the post and your username for it to count.
Don't worry, about submissions, you'll get your points.

list.name: Code tutorial
list.description: You may have noticed a new addition to your profile page. You can take codes you find and put them into the code entry box to earn points. A lot of challenges will provide clues to some sort of code. They will always be in all uppercase with no spaces. You will have to PAYATTENTION to figure them all out.

list.name: Propaganda 2.0
list.description:
Some challenges will require an image submission. You will not receive the points until your submission has been approved.
Continue to prove your loyalty. Draw an omega symbol with the words 'THE OMEGA GAMES' underneath on the board in any of your classes. Take a picture, and submit it.

list.name: Friendly
list.description:
You can't make it through life alone. You need people to stand beside you when times get tough. Just be sure to choose your friends wisely.
Make at least five friends, either by sending friend requests or accepting others' friend requests. There is a new button on your profile page to help with this.
You earn 40 points for each of the first five friends you make.

list.name: GPA flex
list.description:
What has that pesky GPA ever gotten you, anyway? Well, it's getting you points, now, that's what!
Submit a photo of your weighted GPA. You earn GPA*100(rounded to 10s) points.

list.name: Cipher
list.description: Don't want to alarm you, but this one isn't so easy: [[TBBQWBO]]
list.hint: Brackets indicate the code is not literal, but requires some decrypting. Now might be a good time to learn some basic encryption techniques. Have you tried rotating it?

list.name: Monke Business
list.description:
Rumor has it Monke has something for you, but only if you can find him somewhere in Conroe High School. Try paying him court.

WARNING: do NOT remove any codes hidden within the school so others cannot find them. It's not good sportsmanship. Also, you'll be disqualified, so there's that.
list.hint: (-yard). He might be in a less conspicuous corner.

list.name: Bad Time
list.description: Bad time? Bad time. Beat Sans. Have fun.
list.html: <form method='post'> <input type='hidden' name='challenge_id' value='9'><input type='hidden' name='completed' value='0'><button type='submit'>Go to fight</button></form>

list.name: Gimkit
list.description: Time for the first live event. Game will open at [time]. Game code will be put here. You MUST join with your Omega Games username as your Gimkit name or you will NOT receive your points. You will get 150 points for being on the winning team, and 10 points for each elimination you get.
list.competitiveness: You receive 100 more points for being on the winning team.
list.vigilance: You receive 50 points for being on the LOSING team.
list.determination: You receive 10 more points for each elimination you get.

list.name: The Great Search
list.description:
It's off to find some codes.
There's something of note in room (placeholder). Go find it.
Get used to visiting teachers' rooms, this won't be the last time.

WARNING: Do NOT disturb teachers while they are teaching. Give this project a good name. Complaints from teachers will result in disqualification.
list.hint: Don't be shy. Just stop in before or after school, and {name} should direct you to what you need.

list.name: Cipher 2.0
list.hint: Polybius, both of them, even if it doesnt appear so.

list.name: Cipher 3.0
list.description: If you have been paying attention, you probably noticed some encrypted text. You'll need this key to break it, though: [[HEYLOOKACODE]]
list.hint: Caesar, but more complicated because of that key. Misattributed to some French guy.

list.name: Shell shockers
list.description: Time for another live event. We're testing your FPS skills this time. Lobby opens at {{time}}. You get 10 points per kill. As before, you MUST set your shell shockers name to your Omega Games username and remain until the end of the 20 minute round to get your points.
list.competitiveness: You get an additional 2 points per kill. Go crazy.
list.determination: You get an additional 2 points per kill. Go crazy.

list.name: I have a life
list.description: Prove you're not a bum. Submit a photo of you at a real extracurricular (Band, Choir, Orchestra, Theatre, ROTC, sport). Activity must be plainly visible from photo. 200 points per photo.

list.name: I might have a life
list.description: Prove you at least do something with your time, besides this game of course. The bum status can be debated. Submit a photo of you at a minor club (Not the ones listed above, any honor society, weekly club, etc). 40 points per photo.
